feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MB90 is not generating SP02 Spool but Fiori app is able to generate spool for same Material document
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am trying to execute the GUI Transaction Code MB90 , with a material document and output type as WF02. I am able to execute and process it after which processing gives success message and turns green. But SP02 log is not generated for the same. I tried to execute the Fiori counterpart for this TCODE Output material Document (MB90) it is working fine and generating spool.

The GUI is behaving correctly for output WE02 as we checked. And we have used a SAPSCRIPT here.

I debugged the program, but the whole process is same, and the parameters are getting filled as well. NACE Configure is also in place.

Can you please help me here what can be the cause.

Thanks ,

SAPUSER

entry.title: How do you implement a Smarttable for a model which is not the default model?
entry.content: I have this code which works perfectly fine and prints out all elements of the given EntitySet (first screenshot). Then I changed the EntitySet attribute from DemoData to otherService>/DemoData (second screenshot), so I can print out the elements of a model, that is not my default model (the unnamed one), but now there are no elements printed out inside the table. Any help would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Foiri Adaptation Issue Through VS Code
entry.content:
Hello,

I am running into an issue when trying to adapt the Fiori Manage Sales Order - V2 app (F3893).  I was able to create the adaptation project in VS Code as shown here:

But when I try opening it in the Adaptation Editor the editor loads a blank page and a number of errors are displayed in the console.  It appears that the app content is not being downloaded from the server.  The link to the content begins with https://localhost:8081.  This is my first adaptation project so I'm not sure if this is the expected behavior.  Any help getting past this road block would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: index.html missing while genereting app within BAS with CAP local project and SAP Fiori Elements
entry.content:
While I generate app within BAS devspace with CAP local project as data source and SAP Fiori Elements the output does not contain index.html file.

It seems like there is an issue with this generator. As I run this generator project I see error message: index.html does not exist. 

"Fiori App Generator - The Application wizard would have generated 4 html files: webapp/index.html, webapp/test/flpSandbox.html and webapp/test/testsuite.qunit.html and webapp/test/integration/opaTests.qunit.html for each UI component (in folder app/<component> you generate with it. The file webapp/index.html is host the component directly without fiori lanuchpad sandbox environment."

entry.title: Issue with the data sorting in analytical list report page
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am working on an application, where i created a Fiori elements ( Analytical List Report ) application. I have the dimension as year and month and measure as leave count. The data type of year and month is declared string. And leave count as integer. While rendering the chart, i get this issue where the december month record comes first. I have already sorted the data in my CAP server and i can see the response in the network call in the sorted way as i intended. But when the application is displayed, the chart is not in correct sorted order. 

JSON Response. 

Please guide what needs to be done to correctly sort the data.

entry.title: DIP Run- Open Item
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

It appears that something has changed in our DIP RUN, open items from the previous month (in this case JUNE) no longer automatically appear on JULY's DIP run. The only thing is that the error was only in this month.

Could you tell me please, how can I proceed with this issue?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: List report of Fiori Elements using Northwind oData service proper data was not displaying in Table
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

List Report of Fiori elements application using northwind OData service in vs code proper data bind to the ui.lineItem was not display how to resolve it?

entry.title: Leveraging Redis, Hyperscaler Option in SAP UI5 Applications
entry.content:
I'm exploring ways to improve the performance and scalability of my SAP UI5 application by incorporating Redis, Hyperscaler Option Service of SAP BTP. I'm particularly interested in using Redis for caching frequently accessed data and session management.

Could you please share your experiences or best practices for:

  1. Integrating Redis into an SAP UI5 application: What are the recommended approaches for connecting to a Redis instance from a UI5 application?
  2. Caching strategies: How can I effectively leverage Redis to cache data and optimize performance?
  3. Session management with Redis: Is it feasible to use Redis for session management in UI5 applications? If so, what are the key considerations and implementation steps?

Any insights, code examples, or helpful tutorials would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!"

entry.title: my inbox fiori standard application is possible to do Extensions in VS Code
entry.content:
Hi all

standard sap fiori application My Inbox application can we extend in VS Code if possible guide me the how to do it?

entry.title: Exception Handling in Workflow for Sales Documents
entry.content:
During the creation of a workflow in the "Workflow for Sales Documents" app, in the exception handling part for the Rework Requested only "Restart Workflow" option is available as an Action Result. 

In SWDD_SCENARIO, for the sales order approval WS02000006 in the rework of sales order step all of the action results seems to be available, but we can't choose other options in the workflow app.

Does anyone know the solution for this issue, our customer want to use other options such as Continue in case of a Rework. 

Thank you,

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements - Issue with EditFlow (onBeforeCreate)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a List Report & Object Page application and on click of Create, I want to display a Confirmation popup and then proceed to Object Page for creation. For this purpose, I am using onBeforeCreate method of editFlow.

Whenever there are no entries in the List Report page (meaning no table entries), this method is working as expected.

On click of Proceed, it will open the Object Page for Creation. This is as expected.

But, whenever there are entries in List Report page (meaning - I hit the Go button to fetch the entries from Backend), this flow is not working as expected and it behaves weird.

I have entries in the Table. Now I hit the Create button

It opens the confirmation popup. Before clicking on Proceed, It also opens the Object Page.

The pop-up is auto-closed after few seconds and then Object page keeps buffering forever.

The documentation says the method should return a Promise. I have written logic to resolve and reject promise based on the buttons in the confirmation dialog. As said above, it works as expected when there are no entries in the table.

I am not sure what I am missing here. Can someone please help on this?

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Type ERROR:Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'findQueryResultByName') in fiori ALPelement
entry.content: Type ERROR:Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'findQueryResultByName') getting error in sap fiori elements when developing interactive charts in  analytical list page visual code using Open Guided Development.

entry.title: Target was not found. Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getMetadata') in Manage Requests
entry.content:
I'm trying to use Manage Requests - Long-Term Supplier‘s Declarations(F4419) Standard FIORI app. After activating ICF Node and OData Service. Application is showing following error.

Target was not found. Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getMetadata')

In Developer Tool, this call is failing: https://.....:.../sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20240508083600~/sap/fcg/lls/preference/core/dialogs/createAdminUnitBPEntityDialog/CreateAdminUnitBPEntityDialog.js

Any suggestion on, how to debug this further?

entry.title: How to get Adaptation Editor in Mobile Device Mode? - Fiori Adaptation Project
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know how to get the Adaptation Editor to go into Mobile Mode (where the device is set to Mobile as opposed to currently where it just changes the viewport size)
I need to change some displayed fields in Lookup Retail Products however the code switches between a table and a list view dependent on System Device.
I haven't found a way to get the Adaptation Editor (visual editor) to switch modes so can hide/show/edit the list as opposed to just the table.
I have tried forcing the app into system.device.phone = true and various other controller overides but the app fails to load in the editor.
Just seeing if missing something obvious before I try some other alternatives.

entry.title: Manage Purchasing Info Records (F1982) Fiori App : Make a field non-mandatory
entry.content:
SAP Fiori SAP Fiori Elements SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAPUI5 SAP Fiori front-end server 

Hello,

In Manage Purchasing Info Records (F1982) Fiori App, I want to make a field from 'mandatory' to 'non-mandatory'. Let me explain.

In Delivery and Quantity tab, there is a field called 'Delivery Time in Days'. This field is a mandatory field. I want to make this field as 'non-mandatory' (optional).

I modified the code under the data definition 'C_PURINFORECORDWITHORG'. 

What next?

Can anyone guide me with suggestions? Thank you.

entry.title: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STATICS(local)
entry.content:
Hi,

i have a problem .

Atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STATICS(local)

How can i fix this?

Many Thanks for any help..!!!!

entry.title: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.
entry.content:
Hi all,

In List report of fiori elements application when adding the progressive indicator in list page table i am getting error that 
Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details::Products--dataPoint::UnitsInStock::Label'  

please help me how to resolve it?

entry.title: remove these margins
entry.content:
Regarding the left and right margins that appear on a page created with SAPUI5, is there any way to reduce or remove these margins?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a way to delete session cookies after user logs out from Fiori launchpad?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to delete session cookies after user logs out of Fiori launchpad. I found blogs for deleting session cookies from portal on logout but nothing specific for Fiori launchpad.

entry.title: need help in building walkthrough in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have imported the walkthrough of ui5 sdk in web ide by mistake. Earlier version of walkthrough was in web ide, it was now migrated to BAS. So, it has .yaml, npm too. npm has been installed but by mistake I imported the code in web ide. I need to rectify, I am doing the code in VS Studio.

 

Thanks

Kaushik

SAP UI5/Fiori
